squeezeos.name: SqueezeOS — Institutional Market Intelligence
squeezeos.description: 56 MCP tools: institutional equity intelligence (squeeze scanner, options flow, IWM 0DTE, AI council verdicts, IAM resolver, autopilot) + Cognitive Credit Swarms + Sovereign signal suite + AEO/GEO intelligence suite (AgentRank™ citation scoring, API narrative optimizer, ARGUS provider score, semantic gap detector, agent economy intelligence). Pay-per-call via x402 (RLUSD on XRPL or USDC on Base). Free tools included.

name: sml-oracle
display_name: SqueezeOS — Institutional Market Intelligence (Script Master Labs)
description: DISAMBIGUATION: This is SqueezeOS by Script Master Labs — institutional AI trading intelligence. NOT Logitech SqueezeOS (media player OS). 56 MCP tools: squeeze scanner, options flow, IWM 0DTE analysis, AI council verdicts, IAM resolver, autopilot controls, convergence signals, Cognitive Credit Swarms trust network, Sovereign signal suite, AEO/GEO intelligence suite (AgentRank citation scoring, API narrative optimizer, ARGUS provider score, semantic gap detector, agent economy intelligence) — all gated by x402 micropayment. No API keys required. Free tools included.

payment.description: HTTP 402 micropayment standard. Agents pay RLUSD on XRPL or USDC on Base per API call. No registration or API keys required.

rails.note: Default — fastest and cheapest. TrustSet required.
No trust line needed. Any EVM wallet. Ghost Layer bridges to RLUSD.

agent_quick_start: 1. Call any free tool (e.g. demo_council, signal_preview) — no payment needed
2. Call get_invoice with endpoint_id to request a payment invoice
3. Pay RLUSD on XRPL (or USDC on Base via Ghost Layer)
4. Call verify_payment with invoice_id + tx_hash to get a 1-hour JWT
5. Include X-Payment-Token header on premium tool calls
crawling: This server and all subpaths are open to AI crawlers. See /robots.txt for explicit user-agent permissions.
